EXHĀLŌ, THE SPA THAT FEEDS YOUR SOUL.  SIMPLY EXHALE, WE'VE GOT YOU.
Proud Canadian Business Since 2017
 Want to be part of the exhālō Dream Team? 
JOIN US

We Invite You To Apply To  Join Our Award-Winning Beauty & Wellness #exhalodreamteam

 

Are you still searching for your ideal beauty tribe of positive like-minded professionals?  If you're trained and highly educated as a beauty professional - we want to meet you!  Preference will be given to those with 10+ years experience for our coveted Dream Team as certified Master Aestheticians, Hairstylists, or Registered Massage Therapists, but we're also open and on the hunt for those passionate new grads too.   If you're new to the industry, our Dream Team of mentors, educators and industry trainers are here to help you grow even further! 

 

If you feel you've got what it takes, to be a part of our amazing Front Sales team, and you posses an industry passion, we're here for you too, as we continue to experience our organic company growth in Ottawa.  We are always open to receive those with true passion, talent, a zest for life, and a positive giving nature, as we continue our growth of exhālō Spa.
